description_long: This chest of drawers features a modern, rectangular design with a smooth, light wood finish. The front face displays three drawers, with the leftmost section adorned by a subtle geometric pattern, adding a touch of visual interest. The drawers are handleless, contributing to a minimalist aesthetic, and the unit stands on four short, dark legs that slightly elevate it from the ground. The sides and back are plain, showcasing the consistent wood grain texture. The overall construction appears sturdy, suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban environments. Its compact size makes it ideal for use in entryways, hallways, or as a storage solution in garages or offices.
description: A modern, light wood chest of drawers with three handleless drawers, geometric front detailing, and short dark legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing three drawers, with a geometric pattern on the left section and a minimalist, handleless design.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the narrow depth and plain wood grain surface, with two visible legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a flat, unadorned wood panel and the back legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the plain wood finish and two legs.
